headline: Omnicom Media Reboots U.S. Management, Blends Former IPG Leadership
summary: Former Initiative exec Stacy DeRiso becomes general manager-U.S. of Omnicom Media. Omnicom's Susanne Grundmann becomes global brand president of Initiative.

raw.headline: Omnicom Media Reboots U.S. Management, Blends Former IPG Leadership
raw.summary: Former Initiative exec Stacy DeRiso becomes general manager-U.S. of Omnicom Media. Omnicom's Susanne Grundmann becomes global brand president of Initiative.
